title: LE2117_11_F.27 is available
description:
New version: LE2117_11_F.27

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

•Upgraded to Android13 OS

•Android security patch updated to 2023-4-5

•Enable VoNR

•General bug fixes and improvements

If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY starting May 15, 2023. Data rates may apply. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.
